title: Warner Bros.’ Clockwork Closing In on Park Chan-Wook’s ‘The Brigands Of Rattlecreek,’ With Matthew McConaughey, Austin Butler, Pedro Pascal and Tang Wei
content:
ByPat Saperstein

Deputy Editor

Warner Bros. new specialty label Clockwork is in exclusive negotiations for a North American deal for starry Western “The Brigands of Rattlecreek,” directed by Cannes jury presidentPark Chan-Wook. The long-gestating project, which was one of the buzziest packages in Cannes, is set to star Matthew McConaughey, Austin Butler,Pedro Pascaland Tang Wei.

Clockwork is already ticking along after announcing at CinemaCon that it had acquired Sean Baker’s “Anora” follow-up “Ti Amo!”in April. The budding label will also release Ken Russell’s “The Devils” in October after theCannes premiereof the restored version. Clockwork is led by former Neon executive Christian Parkes.

“The Brigands of Rattlecreek” is described as “an iconic tale of vengeance and retribution set in the American West.” A synopsis of the project explains: “A capstone of the themes Park Chan-wook has plumbed across his entire body of work to date, the film is an emotionally explosive and visually stunning meditation on the consequences of violence, the value of family, the power of memory, and the true cost of life.”

McConaughey has been associated with the project for several years: After the script was selected for the Black List in 2006, Amazon acquired rights to the material and was eyeing him to star in 2019.

Park will also produce for Moho Film, alongside Bradley Fischer (“Zodiac”). Back Jisun for Moho Film, Mike Medavoy and Georgia Kacandes are executive producers.

WME and CAA rep the project, while Patrick Wachsberger’s 193, a Legendary company, is representing international sales.
title_zh: 華納兄弟(Warner Bros.)的《時鐘機關》(Clockwork) 正在接近朴贊郁(Park Chan-Wook) 的《拉特克里克的強盜》(The Brigands Of Rattlecreek)，主演包括馬修·麥康納(Matthew McConaughey)、奧斯汀·巴特勒(Austin Butler)、佩德羅·帕斯卡(Pedro Pascal) 和湯唯(Tang Wei)。
content_zh:
由帕特·薩佩斯坦(Pat Saperstein)報導

副編輯

華納兄弟(Warner Bros.)的新專門標籤Clockwork正在進行獨家談判，洽談北美發行星光熠熠的西部片《拉特克里克的強盜》(The Brigands of Rattlecreek)，該片由坎城影展評審團主席朴贊郞(Park Chan-Wook)執導。這個長期醞釀的項目曾是坎城影展上最受矚目的作品之一，預計將由馬修·麥康納(Matthew McConaughey)、奧斯丁·巴特勒(Austin Butler)、佩德羅·帕斯卡(Pedro Pascal)和湯唯(Tang Wei)主演。

Clockwork在四月於CinemaCon上宣布收購肖恩·貝克(Sean Baker)的續集《我愛你！》(Ti Amo!)後，已經開始運作。這個新興標籤還將在十月發行肯·拉塞爾(Ken Russell)的《魔鬼》(The Devils)，該片的修復版將在坎城首映。Clockwork由前Neon高管克里斯蒂安·帕克斯(Christian Parkes)領導。

《拉特克里克的強盜》被描述為“一個設定在美國西部的經典復仇與報復故事。”該項目的概要解釋道：“這部電影是朴贊郞迄今為止整個作品中所探討主題的集大成，是一部情感爆炸且視覺驚豔的冥想，探討暴力的後果、家庭的價值、記憶的力量以及生命的真正代價。”

麥康納已與該項目有幾年的關聯：在2006年劇本被選入黑名單(Black List)後，亞馬遜(Amazon)獲得了該材料的權利，並在2019年考慮讓他主演。

朴贊郞將為Moho Film製作，與布拉德利·費舍(Bradley Fischer)共同合作，後者曾參與《十二宮》(Zodiac)。為Moho Film的巴克·基俊(Back Jisun)、邁克·梅達沃(Mike Medavoy)和喬治亞·卡坎德斯(Georgia Kacandes)擔任執行製片人。

WME和CAA代表該項目，而帕特里克·瓦赫斯伯格(Patrick Wachsberger)的193公司，作為傳奇影業(Legendary)的一部分，則負責國際銷售。
summary_zh:
由帕特·薩佩斯坦(Pat Saperstein)報導

副編輯

華納兄弟(Warner Bros.)的新專門標籤Clockwork正在進行獨家談判，洽談北美發行星光熠熠的西部片《拉特克里克的強盜》(The Brigands of Rattlecreek)，該片由坎城影展評審團主席朴贊郞(Park Chan-Wook)執導。
